description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:jdk-alpine image and a GRADLE_OPTS variable set to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false, with stages build and docker. Add a build job in the build stage that runs ./gradlew build, stores the resulting JAR files matching main-partition/build/libs/*.jar as artifacts that expire after one week. Add a docker-image job in the docker stage that runs manually, excludes tags and the master branch, uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, depends on build, and executes: cd main-partition; docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY; docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME .; docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME. Add a docker-image-master job in the docker stage that runs only on the master branch, uses the same image and service, depends on build, and runs the same commands but builds and pushes the image with the tag latest. Add a docker-image-tags job in the docker stage that runs only on tag pipelines, also depends on build, and builds and pushes the image with the tag $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME.
